basic_details.job_title: MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal)
basic_details.short_information: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology, Bhopal (Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology, Bhopal) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 8 May 2026 on the official website of MANIT Bhopal. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech with a minimum 7.5 CGPA and GATE qualified, M.Tech
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): B.Tech with a minimum 7.5 CGPA and GATE qualified. M.Tech with a minimum 6.5 CGPA and GATE/NET qualified.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 17-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at MANIT Bhopal is 17th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000/-.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the JRF position?
faq.answer: For the JRF post, candidates need a B.Tech with a minimum 7.5 CGPA and GATE qualification, or an M.Tech with a minimum 6.5 CGPA and GATE/NET qualification.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application along with required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for the General/OBC categories, implying it is likely nil for all categories.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is Project/ANRF/CE/.

faq.question: Q9. Where is MANIT Bhopal located?
faq.answer: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal) is located in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh.

faq.question: Q10. When was the advertisement released?
faq.answer: The advertisement for this recruitment was released on 08th May 2026.
